mapper.select: SELECT id, holiday_date as holidayDate, name, is_recurring as recurring, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM holiday ORDER BY holiday_date ASC
SELECT id, holiday_date as holidayDate, name, is_recurring as recurring, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM holiday ORDER BY holiday_date ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO holiday (holiday_date, name, is_recurring) VALUES (#{holidayDate}, #{name}, #{recurring})
